summary: Datasheet-derived draft for STMicroelectronics LPS22HHTR. Interface: I2C/MIPI I3C/SPI capable. Extracted baseline is I2C with CS tied to Vdd_IO; SCL/SDA require pull-ups to Vdd_IO.. Package: HLGA-10L, 2.0 x 2.0 x 0.73 mm typ..

main_component.purpose: Main IC extracted from datasheet/reference sources for LPS22HHTR.
main_component.assignment_reason: Symbol pin map is generated from cited datasheet/reference-design extraction.

support_components.purpose: VDD supply decoupling capacitor; must be placed as near as possible to the supply pads.
VDD_IO supply decoupling capacitor; recommended as a separate capacitor when VDD and VDD_IO are separate supplies.
Optional additional capacitor on VDD line, depending on application.
I2C SCL pull-up to VDD_IO; datasheet states both I2C lines have to be connected to Vdd_IO through pull-up resistors, but supplied chunks do not provide resistor values.
I2C SDA pull-up to VDD_IO; datasheet states both I2C lines have to be connected to Vdd_IO through pull-up resistors, but supplied chunks do not provide resistor values.

assumptions: This recipe was extracted from downloaded datasheet/reference-design sources.
Every generated pin and support component must keep a source citation.
KiCad export is blocked if the extracted evidence is incomplete.

validation_warnings.message: This AI-proposed circuit was extracted from datasheet/reference sources and still needs review.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Check every cited pin, passive value, symbol, footprint, and package before fabrication.

validation_warnings.message: I2C pull-up resistor components are included because the datasheet requires them, but their values are not specified in the supplied chunks.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: Do not use this I2C baseline unchanged for SPI: CS must not be tied high for SPI communication mode.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: For MIPI I3C-only initialization, the supplied chunks describe INT_DRDY connected to VDD_IO; this differs from the I2C/MIPI coexistence baseline where INT_DRDY is left unconnected.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: All voltage and ground supplies must be present at the same time for proper IC behavior, per the application hints.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: Sensor placement and enclosure venting affect response time and measurement quality; place close to vent aperture, minimize dead volume, and consider environmental protection as needed.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.
